summary: Iteration 22 (navbar/changelog/ops/environment) — all backend and frontend acceptance criteria PASS. Backend: /api/system/changelog returns releases[0].version='1.4.0' with date '2026-06', sections with type+items (items cleaned of ** and backticks). /api/ops/update, /api/ops/fix return 400 with 'update.sh not found ... Server operations run on the VPS install.'. /api/ops/restart {panel} and {server} both return 400 'Server operations run on the VPS install.' — no 500, no actual reboot. Project environment field persists via PUT /api/projects/{id} and is returned by GET (verified 'production'). Frontend: sticky app-navbar with navbar-system-info (Debian GNU/Linux 12), Operational, Docker Off, theme-toggle-btn, panel-version (v1.4.0), Update/Fix/Restart buttons all present. sidebar-system-info correctly removed. Clicking panel-version opens changelog-modal with changelog-search (filters as expected — search 'auto' shows Auto-Deploy items), changelog-filter (native <select> — 'Fixed' selectable), changelog-release-1.4.0 card with 'New Version' badge, Added/Fixed sections. Update button opens update-confirm; Fix opens fix-confirm; Restart shows restart-server-btn + restart-panel-btn — clicking each triggers 400 API error surfaced as sonner toast 'Server operations run on the VPS install.' (no crash). app-footer present on Dashboard with © 2026 NEXUS.PANEL, v1.4.0, System Operational, Docker Off, OS. Page heading y=114 > navbar bottom=56 (no overlap). ProjectDetail Overview: auto-deploy-panel x=288 (LEFT), updates-panel x=1096 (RIGHT). Uptime stat card shows '—' (Docker unavailable), Environment stat card shows 'Production' after cfg-environment save. cfg-environment input on Configuration tab saves and reflects in Configuration Summary + Environment stat card. AddProject wizard step 'Build Config' has wizard-environment-input (dropdown with production/staging/etc.). Dashboard empty-state test skipped (1 project exists — as expected, dashboard-empty-new-project-btn not rendered). Zero console errors other than expected 400s from ops endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1377 lines — consider splitting ops endpoints, auth, projects, system routes into separate routers.
changelog parser rebuilds on every request (reads file, regex, no cache). Fine for now but could be cached with mtime invalidation for large CHANGELOG.md.
ProjectDetail.jsx remains ~1200+ lines; splitting recommendation from prior iterations still applies.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing TEST_uienv project. Its environment was set to 'Production' during testing and left as-is (test verified persistence).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only project in DB is TEST_uienv (Failed status, environment='Production'). Docker unavailable in sandbox so uptime/container-health show '—' — expected. Ops scripts return 400 with 'Server operations run on the VPS install.' — expected in sandbox. Do NOT attempt actual reboots.
